task_completion.description: Verify the CT Cranium DICOM scan is loaded in the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The InVesalius application window is visible with medical imaging slices (axial, coronal, sagittal) of a head/cranium displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify a Bone mask or 3D surface is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the InVesalius interface, a mask or 3D surface is generated using the 'Bone' preset (226-3071 HU), visually representing a human skull.

task_completion.description: Verify the bone model is exported to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file manager window, or terminal confirms the creation or saving of 'bone_model.stl' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify a Skin/Soft Tissue mask or 3D surface is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the InVesalius interface, a mask or 3D surface is generated using a 'Skin' or 'Soft Tissue' preset, visually representing the outer facial/head soft tissue.

task_completion.description: Verify the skin model is exported to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file manager window, or terminal confirms the creation or saving of 'skin_model.stl' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the InVesalius GUI to create surfaces and export files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the InVesalius menus and export dialogs, rather than bypassing the software.

integrity.description: The 3D models displayed genuinely correspond to anatomical structures
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D surfaces shown in the application must resemble a realistic human skull and facial skin derived from a CT scan, not arbitrary or empty shapes.

integrity.description: The agent did not create fake files using terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands like 'touch bone_model.stl' or 'echo > skin_model.stl' used to mock the output files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exporting two STL models from a CT Cranium scan using InVesalius. Bone preset: 226-3071 HU. Skin/Soft Tissue preset: -718 to -177 HU (adult) or -766 to -202 HU (child). Output paths must be exactly /home/ga/Documents/bone_model.stl and /home/ga/Documents/skin_model.stl.
